Discover the life that awaits you at Accor, visit https://careers.accor.com/<br><br>Do what you love, care for the world, dare to challenge the status quo! #BELIMITLESS"<br><br><strong>Job Description<br><br></strong><ul><li>Monitor pool areas and enforce safety rules to prevent accidents</li><li>Respond quickly and effectively to emergency situations</li><li>Perform water rescues and administer first aid and CPR when necessary</li><li>Maintain a clean and safe pool environment</li><li>Conduct regular equipment checks and report any issues</li><li>Assist with basic pool maintenance tasks</li><li>Interact professionally with guests and address their concerns</li><li>Participate in ongoing training to maintain and improve lifeguarding skills</li><li>Educate patrons about water safety and pool rules</li><li>Work collaboratively with other staff members to ensure a positive guest experience</li></ul> education, customer support, exec Bardez, 2026-07-07T07:38:08+00:00 1134547 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-lifeguard-accor-1134547 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Dutch Speaking Customer Service Agent For Imperial Work from Home Greece Mercier Consultancy <p>Location:Â Greece (Relocation Opportunity Available)<br />Job Type:Â Full-Time (40 hours per week)</p><p></p><p>We are looking for a Dutch-Speaking Customer Service Agent to support customers on behalf of Imperial. Based remotely in Greece, you'll be responsible for answering customer enquiries via telephone, email, and live online chats.</p><p></p><p>Why Choose Greece?</p><p>Living and working in Greece offers the chance to enjoy an exceptional quality of life while advancing your career in an international environment. With its Mediterranean climate, beautiful coastline, rich history and world-famous cuisine, Greece is an ideal destination for those looking to combine work with an enviable lifestyle.</p><p>Whether you choose to live in the vibrant capital of Athens or another part of the country, you'll have the opportunity to explore picturesque islands, ancient landmarks and lively local communities in your spare time. The cost of living is often lower than in many other European countries, allowing you to make the most of your earnings while enjoying everything Greece has to offer.</p><p>You'll also become part of a welcoming workplace where you'll work alongside colleagues from across Europe and beyond. It's a fantastic opportunity to gain valuable international experience, develop professionally and enjoy a healthy work-life balance in one of Europe's most desirable destinations.</p><p>Â·Â Â Â Â Â Â You must have a C1/C2 level ofÂ Dutch, both written and verbal, and a high level of English.</p><p>Â·Â Â Â Â Â Â Your native language and nationality must be clearly listed in your C.V. and/or Cover Letter.</p><p>Â·Â Â Â Â Â Â You must have a valid EU passport.</p><p>Â·Â Â Â Â Â Â You must be either living in Greece, or willing to relocate. What the role is, who would it interest and why is it exciting<br><br></em><em>Please note we reserve the right to close this role early<br><br></em><strong>Who We Are<br><br></strong>Gold Standard is a not-for-profit organization that helps companies understand the role they should play in creating a net-zero, sustainable nature future and provides tangible ways for them to contribute. This includes investments in their value chains, carbon credits, and other mechanisms for high-integrity climate action that delivers real impact for people and nature. â¯â¯<br><br>The Gold Standard Foundation was established in 2003 byâ¯WWFâ¯and other international NGOs as a best practice standard to ensure projects that reduced carbon emissions under the UNâs Clean Development Mechanism (CDM) also delivered sustainable development benefits. Today, our standard, âGold Standard for the Global Goalsâ, allows climate and development initiatives within carbon markets, corporate supply chains, and sustainable finance to manage, measure and maximise their impacts toward the Net Zero ambition of the Paris Agreement and the Sustainable Development Goals.<br><br><strong>What You Will Be Doing<br><br></strong><strong>WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR:<br><br></strong><strong>What We Can Offer You<br><br></strong><ul><li>All Employees are entitled to 30 days of holiday, pro-rated for part-time Employees.</li><li>Remote Working Contribution for remote workers </li><li>Home office set up allowance</li><li>A mission-driven organisation working at the leading edge of climate and sustainability.</li><li>Rewarding work in a dynamic non-profit environment.</li><li>A collaborative workplace within a multicultural team.</li><li>An ambitious, agile and flexible environment.<br><br></li></ul><strong>We are unable to sponsor VISAs and only candidates with the correct right to work documents will be considered.<br><br></strong><strong>Our Values<br><br></strong><strong>Pioneering - </strong>We focus on those that have the most promise to contribute to our vision and mission, bringing them to market with the requisite planning and resources.<br><br><strong>Rigorous - </strong>We build on our reputation for quality and rigor with more robust measurement of outcomes, stronger safeguards and greater impact across the Sustainable Development Goal
